name: Cash Store
description_short: Cash Store offers same-day installment loans and prepaid cards at physical locations. Houston location provides fast funding for personal expenses.
description_long:
Cash Store is a retail lending company operating physical storefronts, including a location in Houston, Texas at 19734 Tomball Parkway. The company has pivoted its brand identity—the website references both "Cash Store" and "Check 'n Go," suggesting recent rebranding or corporate restructuring. The Houston location maintains active operations with extended hours (10am-6pm weekdays, 10am-2pm Saturday) and maintains a 4.9-star Google rating across 211 customer reviews.

Cash Store specializes in unsecured installment loans designed for consumers needing quick access to cash. Their core offerings include fixed-schedule personal loans, same-day funding upon approval, prepaid Mastercard services (Netspend), and refinancing/reload options for existing customers. Loan amounts and terms are determined through an in-store underwriting process. The company also processes applications online via pre-qualification forms, though customers must visit a physical location to complete funding.

The Houston location differentiates itself through high customer satisfaction ratings and personalized service—multiple reviews specifically praise individual staff members (Janelle, Marlene, Marlen) for professionalism and patience. The company explicitly targets consumers with bad or no credit, stating they evaluate "all applicants" without immediately disqualifying based on credit history. Same-day funding and minimal documentation requirements (valid ID, proof of income, active checking account) position this as a convenience-focused lender.

Cash Store operates as a subprime lender filling a niche for consumers unable to access traditional bank loans. While customer satisfaction is measurably high, the company does not disclose APR, fees, or loan terms on their website—a significant transparency gap. The reliance on physical locations and requirement for active checking accounts may exclude some consumers. The vague pre-qualification process and emphasis on "rates dictated by underwriting" suggests variable pricing that could be expensive for lower-credit applicants.
pros: Same-day funding available after in-store approval and loan origination
Explicitly considers applicants with bad or no credit history, not automatically disqualified
High customer satisfaction: 4.9-star Google rating with 211 reviews praising staff professionalism
Minimal documentation required: valid ID, proof of income, active checking account only
Extended hours including Saturday availability (10am-2pm) for working customers
Prepaid Mastercard option (Netspend) for customers without traditional banking access
Refinancing and reload options available for existing customers via phone
cons: No APR, fees, interest rates, or loan terms disclosed on website—pricing opacity prevents comparison shopping
Requires active checking account for 30+ days, excluding unbanked or recently banked consumers
Must visit physical location in-person; pre-qualification online but funding requires store visit
Vague underwriting criteria: company states rates/amounts determined by proprietary process with no transparency
Website currently shows maintenance message ('Check 'n Go website is currently down'), suggesting operational/technical issues
best_for: Consumers with poor or no credit history unable to qualify for traditional bank loans
Working adults needing emergency cash with same-day access and flexible credit requirements
Borrowers in Houston area preferring in-person financial transactions over purely online lenders
Unbanked or underbanked consumers eligible for prepaid card services alongside loans
diagnosis: Cash Store is best for Houston-area consumers with limited credit history or bad credit needing emergency funds within 24 hours who can visit a physical location and maintain an active checking account. The primary caveat is complete lack of pricing transparency—APR, fees, and term details are nowhere disclosed, making it impossible to assess true cost or compare to alternatives before applying.
services: Unsecured installment personal loans with fixed repayment schedules
Same-day loan funding after in-store approval
In-store loan underwriting and credit decision process
Loan refinancing for existing Cash Store customers
Loan reload/reloans via phone for eligible customers
In-store documentation review and application assistance
Physical store location with customer service associates
Extended retail hours including Saturday availability
